step_1.description: Develop reported count triangle to ultimate and build disposal rate triangle

step_2.description: Select disposal rates by age using latest 2 simple average with 1.00 tail factor

step_3.description: Calculate projected incremental closed with payment claim count

step_5.description: Calculate adjusted to 2008 incremental paid severity with 5% trend and tort reform

step_6.description: Select adjusted incremental paid severities for ages 12-60 using latest 2 simple average

step_7.description: Calculate tail severities for ages 72+ and 84+

step_8.description: Combine selected severities from ages 12 to 108-Ultimate

step_9.description: Project unadjusted incremental paid amounts (count × severity in thousands)

step_10.description: Project total ultimates by AY (sum of projected incremental paid)
